product: CPU_MEDIUM and CPU_LARGE workload types for Model Serving (Beta)
tagline: The CPU MEDIUM and CPU LARGE workload types for Model Serving are now in Beta.
what_it_does: The CPU MEDIUM and CPU LARGE workload types for Model Serving are now in Beta. These workload types let you trade concurrency for more memory per worker on the same CPU hardware. Use them when your model needs more memory than the standard CPU workload type provides.
why_it_matters: Doing so reduces risk of interruption for endpoints that are in use.
key_takeaway: The CPU MEDIUM and CPU LARGE workload types for Model Serving are now in Beta.
